acceptance_criteria: Run-scoped correlation IDs are generated deterministically and propagated into orchestrator outputs
quality_guards: Explicit run scope is preserved while step names are safely tokenized
Timestamp fallback IDs are stable and UTC-normalized
diff:
scripts/pipeline_driver.py         | 34 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++-
 tests/unit/test_pipeline_driver.py | 18 ++++++++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 51 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/scripts/pipeline_driver.py b/scripts/pipeline_driver.py
index bc861ac..487e7c8 100755
--- a/scripts/pipeline_driver.py
+++ b/scripts/pipeline_driver.py
@@ -16,6 +16,37 @@ from pipeline_driver_contracts import parse_step_result
 from pipeline_driver_state import resolve_phase_state
 
 
+def build_correlation_id(
+    feature_id: str,
+    step_name: str,
+    *,
+    run_id: str | None = None,
+    timestamp_utc: datetime | None = None,
+) -> str:
+    """Build a run-scoped correlation ID for step execution and diagnostics."""
+
+    if not feature_id:
+        raise ValueError("feature_id is required")
+    if not step_name:
+        raise ValueError("step_name is required")
+
+    safe_step = re.sub(r"[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]+", "_", step_name).strip("_")
+    if not safe_step:
+        raise ValueError("step_name must contain at least one valid token character")
+
+    if run_id and run_id.strip():
+        safe_run = re.sub(r"[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]+", "_", run_id.strip()).strip("_")
+    else:
+        effective_time = timestamp_utc or datetime.now(timezone.utc)
+        safe_run = (
+            "run_"
+            + effective_time.astimezone(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ")
+            + f"_{feature_id}"
+        )
+
+    return f"{safe_run}:{safe_step}"
+
+
 def _runtime_failure_result(
     *,
     correlation_id: str,
@@ -337,12 +368,13 @@ def main(argv: Sequence[str] | None = None) -> int:
         pipeline_state={"phase": args.phase},
     )
 
+    correlation_id = build_correlation_id(args.feature_id, args.phase)
     step_result = parse_step_result(
         {
             "schema_version": "1.0.0",
             "ok": True,
             "exit_code": 0,
-            "correlation_id": f"{args.feature_id}:{args.phase}:skeleton",
+            "correlation_id": correlation_id,
             "next_phase": phase_state["phase"],
         }
     )
diff --git a/tests/unit/test_pipeline_driver.py b/tests/unit/test_pipeline_driver.py
index 2275f95..2babf54 100644
--- a/tests/unit/test_pipeline_driver.py
+++ b/tests/unit/test_pipeline_driver.py
@@ -51,6 +51,24 @@ def test_main_outputs_minimal_step_result(capsys) -> None:
     assert payload["step_result"]["exit_code"] == 0
 
 
+def test_build_correlation_id_uses_explicit_run_scope() -> None:
+    correlation_id = pipeline_driver.build_correlation_id(
+        "019",
+        "speckit.plan",
+        run_id="run-xyz",
+    )
+    assert correlation_id == "run-xyz:speckit.plan"
+
+
+def test_build_correlation_id_uses_timestamp_when_run_scope_missing() -> None:
+    correlation_id = pipeline_driver.build_correlation_id(
+        "019",
+        "speckit.plan",
+        timestamp_utc=datetime(2026, 4, 10, 12, 34, 56, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
+    )
+    assert correlation_id == "run_20260410T123456Z_019:speckit.plan"
+
+
 def test_run_step_routes_success_envelope() -> None:
     correlation_id = "run-019-success"
     command = [

test_runs.command: .venv/bin/python scripts/speckit_implement_gate.py validate-task-evidence --task-kind module --tests-passed pass --smoke-exit 0 --state-safety pass --transaction-integrity pass --async-safety pass --observability pass --json
